tools.name: cloud_status
tools.description: Live status of AWS, GCP, Azure — active incidents, recent events, EU regions.

tools.name: cloud_incidents
tools.description: Active + recent cloud incidents with timeline.

tools.name: region_status
tools.description: Cloud region status — EU regions for DORA data residency.

tools.name: saas_status
tools.description: SaaS provider status: Cloudflare, GitHub, Datadog.

tools.name: concentration_risk
tools.description: Concentration risk: which providers host critical functions? SPOF analysis.

tools.name: sla_check
tools.description: SLA compliance per provider — Art. 30 contract clause verification.

tools.name: provider_dashboard
tools.description: All providers for an entity with live cloud status + risk assessment.

tools.name: outage_impact
tools.description: Simulate: what happens if provider X goes down? Affected services + DORA actions.

tools.name: ctpp_check
tools.description: Is provider a Critical Third-Party Provider under Art. 31?

tools.name: notification_check
tools.description: Check Art. 30 contract clause compliance per provider.

tools.name: obligation_map
tools.description: Cloud monitoring obligations with cross-jurisdiction equivalents.

tools.name: sync_to_ampel
tools.description: Push cloud risk to AmpelOracle Art. 28 checks.
